channel.title: Modernization on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Modernization on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: dotnet: Your Migration’s Source of Truth: The Modernization Assessment
item.description:
The post introduces GitHub Copilot Modernization and focuses on the assessment report as the source of truth for cloud modernization work. It frames the report as part of the migration process and positions it as the primary reference for modernization planning.

  • Source: .NET

item.title: dotnet: Modernize .NET Anywhere with GitHub Copilot
item.description:
Microsoft introduced the modernize-dotnet agent to help assess apps, generate upgrade plans, and modernize .NET projects. It is available in Visual Studio, VS Code, GitHub Copilot CLI, and GitHub.

  • Source: .NET
